who: field service supervisors in the construction industry processing 5–15 safety inspections/month
offer: For field service supervisors in the construction industry processing 5–15 safety inspections/month, manual report compilation causes delays in compliance reporting. We simplify report generation instead of manual compilation using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in compiling safety inspection checklists into regulatory reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for field service supervisors
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to field service supervisors with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and tips
try_it: Let users try template-based checklist creation and manual invoice entry
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
